meaning: n.油炸食物,油炸锅,鱼苗,鱼秧v.油炸,油煎
examples: You'll fry on the beach if you're not careful.
We should use slow fire to fry fish.
And big fish provide more and better-quality fry.
The smells of freshly made pastry, noodle soup and stir fry hang in the air.
But Ford isn't the only one playing big-company antics more common among small-fry marketers.
